productDisplayName: Carlton London Women Contemporary Black Flats
description: Look all the more elegant with this stylish pair of slippers from carlton london. Designed to enhance your feminine side, this pair looks fabulous when teamed with jeans and an ethnic top, or simply stylish ethnic wear.UpperThree synthetic leather straps in plaited style for enhanced comfortToe separator for added comfortMidsolePU midsole for durability and comfortDesigned footbed in contrast shade with design and brand printOutsoleTPR outsole for enhanced durability and comfortSpiral grooves on the forefoot and heel for grip and stabilityMildly raised heel unit for style and comfortshoe careWipe surface using a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
